S.FORM: Roland Trebicka kawas tay 1947, Roland Trebicka, squliq na Bunge. (wal mhuqil sa kawas tay 2013) cinkhulan sa knita sa brbiru Lists of actors
S.PHON: rolan* treŒ≤i ¶~ ®ka kawas~…ï taj ****, rolan* treŒ≤i ¶~ ®ka, s~…ïquliq na Œ≤u≈ãe. (wal mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru lis~…ïts~…ï o* a ¶~ ®tors~…ï
